description: Ground truth benchmark cases for the BioThings plugin agent pipeline (relevancy-analysis → site-inspection → plugin-generator).

cases.name: ECBD (European Chemical Biology Database)
cases.test_prompt: Evaluate the European Chemical Biology Database (ECBD) at https://ecbd.eu for BioThings ingestion

relevancy.rationale: Primary HTS screening data, bioprofiling, and negative results not in ChEMBL/BioThings; CC-BY 4.0; public bulk download with no login

plugin.notes: Multi-file: bioactives.csv + fragments.csv + nuisance_set.csv. on_duplicates ignore because IDs may span files.

api_spot_check.reason: ecbd.eu uses a self-signed TLS certificate and has no documented REST API; source data is only accessible via static CSV file downloads (curl --insecure required)

cases.name: SIGNOR 4.0 (PhosphoSIGNOR)
cases.test_prompt: Evaluate SIGNOR 4.0 at https://signor.uniroma2.it for BioThings ingestion

relevancy.rationale: Causal signaling interactions with PTM residue-level annotations, signed/directed edges, and confidence scores not in any BioThings source; CC-BY 4.0

plugin.notes: PhosphoSIGNOR API endpoint (role=all&format=tsv). groupby aggregation on signor_id. 13,411 docs in reference run.

api_spot_check.reason: getData.php ignores signor_id filter and always returns full 42K-row dataset; no per-record JSON REST endpoint exists. Verified 2026-06-22: getData.php?signor_id=X returns 42,527 rows regardless of value.

cases.name: Harmonizome 3.0
cases.test_prompt: Evaluate Harmonizome 3.0 at https://maayanlab.cloud/Harmonizome for BioThings ingestion

relevancy.rationale: Aggregator with heavy upstream overlap with existing MyGene.info sources (GO, KEGG, CTD); CC-BY-NC requires review; pending.api roster must be checked for existing harmonizome/enrichr plugin

cases.notes: NEEDS_REVIEW due to: (1) CC-BY-NC license, (2) pending.api overlap risk, (3) requires scoped ingestion to additive datasets only. A plugin WAS generated for Achilles subset — 4,831 docs.

cases.name: Therapeutic Target Database (TTD) 2026
cases.test_prompt: Evaluate the Therapeutic Target Database (TTD) 2026 at https://idrblab.org/ttd/ for BioThings ingestion

relevancy.rationale: No documented bulk download or API — web interface only; CC-BY-NC; underlying bioactivity largely from ChEMBL/BindingDB/PubChem already in BioThings; unique value is curated druggability status

cases.name: GENCODE 2025 (Release 47)
cases.test_prompt: Evaluate GENCODE 2025 (Release 47 human / M36 mouse) at https://www.gencodegenes.org for BioThings ingestion

relevancy.rationale: GENCODE IS the Ensembl human/mouse gene build already in MyGene.info; only transcript-level tags (MANE Select, APPRIS, biotypes) are genuinely additive; scope must be defined before plugin work

cases.name: Gene Ontology Knowledgebase 2026
cases.test_prompt: Evaluate the Gene Ontology Knowledgebase 2026 at https://geneontology.org for BioThings ingestion

relevancy.rationale: GO is already a core MyGene.info source; re-ingesting as new datasource is redundant; novelty = 1/5; only GO-CAM models might be additive but require separate verification

cases.name: GoFCards (Gain-of-Function Cards)
cases.test_prompt: Evaluate GoFCards at http://www.genemed.tech/gofcards for BioThings ingestion

relevancy.rationale: Openness FAIL: bulk download requires login/registration — hard blocker per pipeline decision rules. CC-BY-NC adds additional risk. Data is otherwise relevant and novel.

cases.name: CircTarget
cases.test_prompt: Evaluate CircTarget at https://circtarget.cn for BioThings ingestion

relevancy.rationale: No stated data license is a hard blocker per decision rules; RAR archive format not supported by BioThings Hub dumper; circRNA-RNA interactions are novel but entity type is non-core BioThings

cases.name: COCONUT — Collection of Open Natural Products
cases.test_prompt: Evaluate COCONUT at https://coconut.naturalproducts.net for BioThings ingestion

relevancy.rationale: 738K+ natural product structures with NPLikeness, NP Classifier annotations, organism provenance, and 63+ collection sources — NP-specific annotation layer largely absent from ChEMBL/PubChem; CC0 public domain; single public bulk CSV download with no auth

plugin.notes: Single large CSV (738K rows, 248 MB zipped). Streaming parser required. 44 source columns mapped to nested coconut.* namespace with properties, classification, np_classifier, organisms, collections, synonyms, and xrefs sub-dicts.

api_spot_check.reason: COCONUT REST API requires user registration (email + password via Laravel Sanctum). Pipeline policy: any source requiring authentication is a hard skip — no logins or credentials for automated spot checks.

reference.note: Field map and fetch spec preserved for manual verification only. Not used in automated benchmarking.

cases.name: RNAcentral 2026
cases.test_prompt: Evaluate RNAcentral 2026 at https://rnacentral.org for BioThings ingestion

relevancy.rationale: ncRNA cross-references moderately novel for BioThings; CC0 fully open; FTP bulk download. NEEDS_REVIEW because scope must be defined (per-db TSVs preferred over 1.7 GB superset) and gene-level entries are API-only in release 26.

plugin.notes: Multi-file (hgnc.tsv + ensembl_gencode.tsv + refseq.tsv + mirbase.tsv). human-only (taxon 9606). Reference run produced a plugin.

api_spot_check.notes: xrefs and publications are returned as pagination URLs (not inline data); rfam_family and disease_associations require additional API calls beyond the base endpoint and are expected to come from the FTP source files instead

cases.name: TPDdb (Targeted Protein Degrader Database)
cases.test_prompt: Evaluate TPDdb at https://idrblab.org/TPDdb/ for BioThings ingestion

plugin.notes: Multi-file: 6 main tables + 3 activity files + diseases + PDB. One doc per degrader compound keyed by TPD ID. Targets pending.api. 28K+ degraders (PROTAC 21K + MG 6K + LYTAC/ATTEC/AUTAC/AUTOTAC).

api_spot_check.reason: TPDdb has no per-record REST API endpoint; all data available only as bulk TSV file downloads from tpddb.idrblab.net/sites/files/tpd_download/

cases.name: MeDIC (Matrix Drug Indication and Contraindication)
cases.test_prompt: Evaluate MeDIC at https://medic.renci.org/ for BioThings ingestion

plugin.notes: 3 files: drugList.tsv + indicationList.xlsx + contraindicationList.xlsx. One doc per drug keyed by CURIE. Nested indications[] and contraindications[] lists with MONDO disease IDs.

api_spot_check.reason: MeDIC has no public per-record REST API; data distributed exclusively via GitHub release TSV/XLSX downloads (everycure-org/matrix-drug-list and matrix-indication-list repos)

cases.name: Chem(Pro)2 (ChemoProteomic Probe Square)
cases.test_prompt: Evaluate Chem(Pro)2 at https://chemprosquare.idrblab.net/ for BioThings ingestion

plugin.notes: 603 probes + 1087 competitors, each keyed by InChIKey. Experiment-level data joined from chemoproteomics_experiment.txt. Targets MyChem.info.

api_spot_check.reason: ChemPro2 / chemprosquare.idrblab.net has no documented per-record JSON REST API; source data available only as static TSV file downloads

cases.name: GTO (Gene Therapy Omnibus)
cases.test_prompt: Evaluate GTO at http://www.inbirg.com/gto/ for BioThings ingestion

plugin.notes: Primary file: GTO_clinic_data.xlsx (6333 rows). Joined with GTO_indication.xlsx for DOID/MONDO cross-refs. One doc per gene therapy clinical trial record keyed by GTOID.

api_spot_check.reason: GTO (inbirg.com) has no public per-record REST API; all data distributed via Excel file downloads only

cases.name: GENEasso (Gene-Disease Association Atlas)
cases.test_prompt: Evaluate GENEasso at https://www.geneasso.net/ for BioThings ingestion

plugin.notes: 11 method-specific TSV files (MAGMA/DEPICT/PASCAL/LDAK-GBAT/RWAS/SMR_*). Each row is a gene-GWAS-method association. Composite key: ENSG + DAGENA + Method. 716K total associations across methods. Free for all including commercial use.

api_spot_check.reason: GENEasso bulk files are method-level flat exports; no per-record REST endpoint returning individual association records by composite key

cases.name: scTWAS Atlas (Single-Cell TWAS eQTL Atlas)
cases.test_prompt: Evaluate scTWAS Atlas at https://ngdc.cncb.ac.cn/sctwas/ for BioThings ingestion

plugin.notes: Single 127MB TSV (Allstudies_sig_eQTL.txt). ~1.3M SNP-gene-celltype-condition rows. Composite key: Ensembl ID + Cell Type + Cell Condition + SNP ID. Note: contains sc-eQTL INPUT data, not TWAS associations (those are not bulk-downloadable).

api_spot_check.reason: scTWAS Atlas (ngdc.cncb.ac.cn) has no per-record REST API; data available only as bulk static TSV file download. TWAS associations are web-only (MySQL backend, not exportable).

cases.name: MolBIC (Molecular Binding Interaction Compendium)
cases.test_prompt: Evaluate MolBIC at https://molbic.idrblab.net/ for BioThings ingestion
cases.blocked_reason: Download files cannot be fetched programmatically — Drupal serves them only via browser JS click. Standard biothings-cli dump will fail. Plugin stage blocked until manual download workaround is implemented.

cases.name: PersADE (Personalized Adverse Drug Event database)
cases.test_prompt: Evaluate PersADE at https://idrblab.org/persade/ for BioThings ingestion
cases.blocked_reason: Available bulk download is the 2023 mtADENet dataset (~461K associations), not the full 2026 PersADE (4M claimed). Personalization data (the key novel feature) is not available in bulk download. Plugin stage blocked until full 2026 export is available.
